findings.description: Source has `nameAlias属性の使用方法` as a top-level heading (using `======` separator — the same level as `コード値の表示`), but it is merged into s3 along with the ハイライト表示 content. A heading at the same structural level as s4's source heading is not reflected as a separate knowledge section.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines: `nameAlias属性の使用方法` with `======` underline — same marker as `コード値の表示` section header.

findings.description: The full Java validation method (`validateForRegisterUser`) demonstrating the cross-field validation scenario that motivates nameAlias usage is omitted. The source first shows the initial scenario where the error is registered under `mobilePhoneNumberAreaCode` (highlighting only one field), then explains why all three fields should highlight, then introduces nameAlias as the solution. This before/after context and the complete Java code (ValidationUtil.validateWithout, context.isValid(), getConvertedValue, length checks, addResultMessage with original property name) are absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source Java block: `public static void validateForRegisterUser(ValidationContext<UsersEntity> context) { ... context.addResultMessage("mobilePhoneNumberAreaCode", "MSG00004"); }`

findings.description: Section s4 text references `WebView_WriteTag` and `WebView_SingleCheckBoxTag` as similar tags (PascalCase names appearing in the section content), but neither is included in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `codeタグは :ref:`WebView_WriteTag` と同様の使い方で...` and `codeCheckboxタグは、:ref:`WebView_SingleCheckBoxTag` と同様に...`
